input: Turn this into a GitHub issue: We need a way to export user data as CSV from the admin dashboard. Users should be able to filter by date range and export up to 10,000 rows.
context: The /spec skill should output a well-structured GitHub issue with a title, user story, acceptance criteria, and technical notes.

criteria.description: Output includes a clear, action-oriented issue title (e.g. 'Add CSV export to admin dashboard')
Output includes a user story ('As a... I want... So that...' or equivalent)
Output includes at least 3 specific, testable acceptance criteria
Acceptance criteria includes the 10,000 row limit as a specific requirement
Acceptance criteria includes date range filtering as a requirement
Issue does not prescribe how to implement (no specific library names, no architecture decisions)
